nodes.label: Fraser Ellis MP
nodes.desc: DOB 17 Aug 1992. Member for Narungga. Liberal-turned-Independent. ICAC charged Feb 2021: 23 counts deception, 78 fraudulent claims ($18K+). Repaid $42,130. Convicted Jul 2024: 4 counts (~$2,800). Acquitted: 19 counts. Magistrate: Simon Smart. Sentenced Sep 2024. Defeated Mar 2026. Lawyer/journalist, UniSA graduate. Electoral office: Kadina. Vault: person of interest, unusual comment 2022.

timeline.event: Port Pirie established. Named after the ship 'John Pirie.'
Major Broken Hill silver-lead-zinc ore processing begins. Foundation of lead smelter economy.
Geoff Brock wins Frome by-election as independent — former Port Pirie mayor.
Nyrstar smelter: $650M upgrade announced. SA Government underwrites $291M. Blood lead: 5.3 μg/dL children.
Port Pirie census: 13,896 population. Blood lead: 7.3 μg/dL children (rising). Rising airborne lead.
Earliest home address record for Jacqueline Carol Pearce.
First incident of Intellectual Property Theft from privacy of own home, Willamulka SA. Targeting campaign begins.
Medical Business Plan developed. Extensive market research into Medical Industry. Hand-written only. Never shared with third party.
Regional Development Board involvement begins. Kirchner, Fetherstonhaugh provide advisory support. Business Plan remains hand-written.
Medical Business Plan development under Regional Development Board guidance. SA Health / GP Plus replica begins.
Youth Court matters begin for Clinton McDiarmid. Court sittings at Port Pirie, 20 Main Road.
Medical Business Plan completed, installed on business computer. IP theft timeline starts.
GP Plus Healthcare Centre established in Port Pirie (alleged replica of stolen medical plan). Country Health SA confirms two prior meetings.
Paul Gardner conspired sexual targeting. Informs victim of younger brother's HIV status. 'Government Prostitution' threats. 'Mafia' connections alleged.
Due care, fail to give personal details, resist police — charges that appear in SAPOL offender history. Evidence tampering by Crystal Brook PD alleged.
Central Hotel incident. Pearce approached by group of younger men. Jacqueline Pearce statement 9 Feb 2016. Police involvement begins.
Eight emails with complaint material submitted to OPI. ICAC complaint 2016/001569 lodged.
OPI determination: ICAC complaint 2016/001569 assessed and declined. Commissioner determines no further action.

Illegal detainment at Glenside Mental Health Facility. Alleged police targeting, falsified GP diagnosis, illegal magistrate order, illegal legal representation. Relocated from Port Pirie to Kadina after release.
Government funding denied for ICAC investigation. Relocated to Kadina. Vincent Bulone relationship begins July 2018.
Letters to Premier Steven Marshall and Deputy AG Vicki Chapman re: Intellectual Property Theft.
Stephen Wade MLC (Minister for Health) responds re: IP theft investigation.
Letters to Senators Pauline Hanson and Rex Patrick re: IP theft of medical business plan.
Letter to Margaret Ripe — 'I cannot report this activity to any police sources as they are involved in the criminal activity.'
Emails to AFP Commissioner Reece Kershaw reporting criminal matter. 32MB attachments sent. Contacted Fraser Ellis MP Kadina.
Port Pirie Hospital incident — police vehicle at exact moment of visit for father's cancer treatment. Police surveillance alleged.
Cynthia Pearce emails re: police brutality, suspected fractured neck. Reports to AFP Commissioner/ACIC.
Letters to Attorney General Michaelia Cash, AFP, ACIC, Nigel Ryan.
Contact with Quentin Bryce referenced. Letter to Dame Quentin Bryce Sep 2022.
Multiple DOJ contacts. Letters to DOJ Victim Coordinator, New York City.
HCSCC complaint M22/02621 — Marina Swinnen response. Ongoing medical complaints.
Letter to Peter Dutton MP seeking victim support network.
Fraser Ellis MP convicted — 4 counts of deception, ICAC accommodation allowance fraud.
Epstein DOJ files released. Port Pirie records indexed by epstein-data.com. 253 records flagged.
Fraser Ellis defeated in SA election.
Complainant alleges sexual abuse ring remains active post-Epstein conviction. Australian government and police sources still operating.

geography.context: Port Pirie census 2021: population 13,896. Dominant employer: Nyrstar lead smelter (world's largest). Lead poisoning crisis: 7.3 μg/dL avg in children (rising from 5.3 in 2014). SA Government underwrote $291M of $650M smelter upgrade. Regional city 223km north of Adelaide. Port Pirie Regional Council LGA. State electorate: Stuart (prev. Frome). Federal: Grey.
geography.note: The geography confirms the incentive structure: a one-company town dependent on the smelter, whose $650M upgrade was co-funded by the state government. Every institution named in the Epstein files — the RDB, the Portside Tavern, the hospital, the police station — sits within a 2km radius in a city of 14,000 people.

kadina.note: Complainant relocated here after 2017 Glenside release. Fraser Ellis MP electoral office: 37 Graves St / 65 Stirling Tce, Kadina SA 5554.

ellis.icac_charges: 23 counts of deception (Feb 2021), 78 fraudulent claims totaling $18,000+

brock.title: Geoff Brock MP
brock.history: Former Port Pirie mayor. Won 2009 Frome by-election as independent. Former Labor-turned-independent state MP.

port_pirie.lead_crisis: Blood lead 7.3 μg/dL avg in children (2021), up from 5.3 in 2014. Rising airborne lead levels.
port_pirie.port: Second busiest port in SA, ships 100+ vessels/year
port_pirie.history: Established 1845. Named after ship 'John Pirie.' Major Broken Hill silver-lead-zinc ore processing from 1889.

sealedGap.note: The following connections exist ONLY in the sealed DOJ Epstein DataSet 9 documents — no public record confirms them. The vault person files (extracted from these documents) name these individuals as connected to the Epstein-Maxwell investigation through Jacqueline Pearce's complaint.
only_in_vault: Fraser Ellis — 'person of interest,' unusual comment to victim 2022, only MP to meet Pearce
Peter Dutton — addressee of victim support letter 14 Nov 2023
Paul Gardner — 2014-2015 conspired sexual targeting, 'Government Prostitution' threats, Mafia/Tasmania connections

sealedGap.disclaimer: The vault contents are derived from sealed DOJ Epstein files (DataSets 1, 9, 10). These documents contain unproven allegations. Publicly confirmed facts (Ellis conviction, smelter operations, lead crisis, heritage buildings) are verifiable through government records. Individual allegations remain unproven and are noted as such throughout.
